arts.ttl: Barcelona vs Real Madrid – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Barcelona and Real Madrid meet in El Clasico this weekend with the stakes high at Estadi Olimpic Lluis Companys. Barcelona lead the title race by four points heading into the final four fixtures, and victory would put the Catalans within touching distance of La Liga. arts.ttl: Barcelona vs Real Madrid: Kick-off time and where to watch El Clasico from USA
arts.sum: T he match that everyone has been waiting for has finally arrived, and on Sunday Barcelona and Real Madrid will fight for the title this season in LaLiga . Barcelona go into El Clasico as the leaders of the tournament with 79 points, compared to Los Blancos' 75, so a victory for the Catalans would put them seven points clear, and while a win would not officially give them the championship with nine points still to play for, everyone knows that it would mean winning the tournament virtually.
